empty.title: No net worth to show yet
empty.body: Record a snapshot on any position — a bank account balance, a property value — and your net worth will appear here, tracked month by month.

secondary.label: Also in
secondary.noRate: ≈ — · no {{currency}} rate yet — add one in Settings to convert.

headline.stalePositions_one: ⚠ {{count}} position carried forward — record {{when}} snapshot to keep this up to date.
headline.stalePositions_other: ⚠ {{count}} positions carried forward — record {{when}} snapshots to keep this up to date.

missingFx.line: ⚠ Net worth excludes {{subject}} — no {{when}} exchange rate for {{currencies}}. Add {{addRate}} in Settings.

thisMonth.title: This month
thisMonth.baseline: First tracked month — there's no earlier month to compare against yet, so income and spending figures start the month after.

statement.assetValueChangeHint: Non-cash — depreciation or revaluation of property and vehicles. No money changed hands.
statement.livingExpensesHint: Estimated from the change in your net worth minus tracked income and investment return. This app doesn't track individual purchases.
statement.unexplainedIncreaseHint: Your net worth rose more than tracked income and investment return explain — for example an untracked gift or a revaluation.
